title: Create Ore Excavation
description: Extract resources using machines powered by Rotational Force
body:
This mod adds hidden infinite ore veins to your world. You can extract these ores using machines. This mod requires [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create).

Features:
- Adds hidden ore veins and fluid reservoirs that has a random chance to spawn in a chunk. Only one ore vein can exist in each chunk
- The veins are infinite
- Ore vein types can be configured using a Datapack or KubeJS
- Harvest the ores using Drilling Machine, and Fluid Extractor
- The machines are powered by Rotational Force
- Use the 'Ore Vein Finder' item to find ore veins and fluid reservoirs
